name: Guiltless Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine cocoa, oil and bananas in a food processor or blender. Puree until smooth.
3. Add sugar, eggs, flour and banana mixture to a mixing bowl. Beat until blended.
4. Stir in the chopped nuts.
5. Pour batter into a lightly oiled 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until done (toothpick inserted comes out clean).
7. Cut cooled brownies into squares.
1/24 recipe - 15 calories, 1 starch/bread + 1 fat exchange; 2 grams protein, 16 grams carbohydrate, 5 grams fat, 104 mg sodium
Adapted from Quick & Easy Diabetic Menus by Betty Wedman, 1993. Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Feb 94.
I suggest cutting into 48 squares for easier consumption and better meal planning for diabetics. This recipe fits within the American Diabetes Association guideline of 1 teaspoon sugar per serving.
